subcodes.first_line: O Abraham! Verily the glorious Friend hath been expelled from the near homeland to the furthermost realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم ان الخلیل الجلیل قد اخرجوه من الوطن القریب الی العدوه القصوی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
